content.en:
Rumble!

Ye Tian directly killed the main hall, and the guardian formation of the main hall could not stop Ye Tian's attack at all.

Click!

The formations of the main hall were all shattered, and a large number of Ancient Star Clan powerhouses instantly turned into ashes.

The three first-class invincible people tried to resist Ye Tian, but they were beaten into nothingness by Ye Tian's blow, and they couldn't withstand Ye Tian's casual blow at all, and the gap between the two sides was too big.

The entire hall was shattered by Ye Tian, Ye Tian's hands directly shattered the void, probed into a treasure house in the main hall, directly uprooted the treasure house, and at the same time took away all the void balls left by those first-class invincibles.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian directly tore through the barrier of the Xingchen Ancient Domain and wanted to leave the Xingchen Ancient Domain.

Not far away, the invincible man was extremely angry when he saw this scene.

"Damn outsiders!"

He tried his best to stop Ye Tian, but his strength was not good, and he was knocked away by Ye Tian again.

And at this time, Ye Tian finally succeeded in tearing apart the barrier of the Xingchen Ancient Domain and left the Xingchen Ancient Domain.

Just a few breaths after Ye Tian left, a supreme person came here, but unfortunately took a step back and forth.

Donghe, as one of the top ten supreme beings, also came here, with a gloomy face.

When he heard that a first-class invincible person could injure a supreme person with a single blow, this was the strength to kill an ordinary supreme person!

Even a genius like the Void Divine Son definitely doesn't have such combat power.

"I'm afraid that the other party is the most demonic genius in the outside world, how dare such a genius enter our Star Ancient Domain?"

But now, the other party has left, and he can't kill the other party if he wants to.

......

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian came back and began to sort out the harvest this time.

He opened the treasury and quickly found six Eternal Resources, plus the five Eternal Resources he had obtained before, this time he had obtained a full eleven Eternal Resources.

The sixteen eternal resources of the Void Source Hall itself, and the three eternal resources obtained within Long Ze.

In other words, he now has a total of thirty eternal resources.

With thirty resources, Ye Tian didn't have to worry about eternal resources for the time being, and when his cultivation was raised to the extreme of a first-class invincible, and the Endless Source Body was raised to the current extreme, he could start to condense the Endless Eternal Tribulation Body.

"The Star Ancient Domain and the Ancient Star Clan have a great opportunity, and they may even be above the Void Source Palace, and now there is no shortage of eternal resources, you can go and explore this opportunity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had already planned, he was going to copy the body of a weak Ancient Star Clansman and send it to the Star Ancient Domain, so as to rise step by step, so that he would not be discovered, otherwise directly copying the body of a first-class invincible person would definitely be exposed soon.

Because copying the body of a living first-class invincible person is very easy to find out, if it is a copy of a fallen first-class invincible, it is equivalent to a sudden resurrection, and the ancient star clan is not stupid, so they will naturally think that he is a fake.

Therefore, only by copying the very weak Gu Xing clan people will not attract the attention of others.

Previously, in the battle of one star of the Ancient Star Clan, many weak Ancient Star Clansmen were affected, and some of them had fallen, and he was ready to copy one of the ordinary Ancient Star Clansmen who were very weak and powerless, and then give this body Ancient Star Eternal Ancestor.

In this way, the replica body can rise very quickly.

"Let's do it!"

Ye Tian decided.

He got the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestor Fu on the copy body to the Invincible Ancestor Split, and then disintegrated the copy body, re-copied the body of a weak Ancient Star Clan's youth, and then stripped off the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestor Fu on the Invincible Ancestor Split and integrated it into the Ancient Star Clan's body.

In this way, this Ancient Star Clan's replica body has the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

this day.

Ye Tian's body came to the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and with one hand, he tore through the barrier of the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and sent the ancient Star Clan's copy body into the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and positioned it on a star.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian's copied body appeared directly on the stars of the Ancient Star Clan, and his current identity was a young man of the Ancient Star Clan, and his true identity would definitely not be discovered.

Rumble!!!!

A supreme person came to this star, and his divine sense shrouded a large number of stars in a territory, and naturally swept over Ye Tian's Ancient Star Clan's body, but the other party didn't notice it, only thinking that Ye Tian was really an Ancient Star Clan.

"Next, let's cultivate in this star, with the qualification of this body ancient astral body eternal ancestor, I can improve my cultivation in an instant!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Soon, Ye Tian integrated into the environment of this star, and as his cultivation continued to improve, his reputation began to spread.

Moreover, he also chose to join the peripheral forces of a large force.

In this way, billions of years later, Ye Tian cultivated to the Ancestral Realm, that is, the Ancestor Realm of the Human Race.

Before you know it, a great catastrophe has passed.

And Ye Tian's reputation has already resounded throughout the Star Ancient Domain, because he has broken through to the realm of the invincible, and the strength of the foundation is far greater than that of other invincibles, and the combat power is very terrifying, this is still Ye Tian deliberately hiding most of his strength, otherwise it is enough to make the top ten supreme people shocked.

With the improvement of his strength, Ye Tian gradually came into contact with the high-level of the Xingchen Ancient Domain.

A few more Great Tribulations had passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation had been raised to the realm of a fourth-rank invincible.

Finally, on this day, he was invited to enter the Holy Land of the Ancient Star Clan.

"Are you going to get in touch with the true fate of the Ancient Star Clan?"

Ye Tian muttered.

On this day, he was personally picked up by a first-class invincible, and soon came to the holy land of the Ancient Star Clan, the Ancient Star.

Ancient Star is the name of the Holy Land, and it is also the origin of the name of the Ancient Star Clan.

When Ye Tian came here, he found that there were many geniuses of the Ancient Star Clan gathered here, and there were many fourth-rank invincibles, third-class invincibles, second-class invincibles, and first-class invincibles, and there were about 100,000 geniuses of the Ancient Star Clan.

Of course, compared to the number of powerhouses in the entire Ancient Star Clan, this is just a drop in the ocean.

After all, if you want to get a place to enter the Holy Land, it is very difficult, and if you are not a real genius, you can't enter here at all.

Abrupt.

A powerful Supreme One has arrived.

When this Supreme One came here, many of the Holy Land guards respectfully said, "I've seen Lord Donghe!"

East River!

One of the ten supreme beings of the ancient star clan, it is the true power of the ancient star clan, far above the other supremes.

Donghe looked at the many Ancient Star Clan geniuses present and said, "Everyone, you may wonder what it means to enter the Holy Land this time, but I want to tell you that this is an opportunity, and if you can get an amazing opportunity, you must seize this opportunity." Of course, there are many clansmen who have been here more than once, but every clansman must grasp every opportunity, after all, every clansman only has five chances in his life. "

Soon, Donghe revealed a secret.

After Ye Tian heard this, he was shocked.
